name: Gamma ray
icon_idea: Yellow gamma burst over sand-shale layers with a low-to-high GR curve
notes: Use as reservoir/lithology gate rather than hydrate proof

name: Deep resistivity
icon_idea: Orange current path around pores with hydrate blocking conductive water
notes: Pair with clean sand and porosity context to avoid high-Rt false positives

name: Bulk density
icon_idea: Green rock cube on a small density scale with rho_b label
notes: Use as measured density input and equation source

name: Density porosity
icon_idea: Open pore gauge derived from RHOB with a small equation tag
notes: Show as derived feature unless workbook confirms supplied field

name: NMR porosity
icon_idea: Blue pulse rings around pore-fluid droplets
notes: Separate measured NMRPHI from target-derived NMR_SAT

name: Compressional velocity
icon_idea: Blue compression wave passing through a rock block
notes: Used for velocity and acoustic impedance features

name: Shear velocity
icon_idea: Purple sideways shear wave bending a rock block
notes: Used for rigidity and Vp/Vs context

name: Velocity ratio
icon_idea: Split P-wave and S-wave icon with ratio badge
notes: Derived feature that inherits Vp and Vs quality

name: Acoustic impedance
icon_idea: Rock block plus wave with AI = rho_b * Vp badge
notes: Use as rock-physics feature not direct label

name: Shear stiffness feature
icon_idea: Shear wave plus rho_b * Vs^2 mini-equation
notes: Use with lambda-rho in geomechanical feature sketch

name: Compressional stiffness feature
notes: Keep equation readable and avoid overexplaining on slide

name: Caliper and differential caliper
icon_idea: Red borehole walls with caliper arms and in-gauge/washout markers
notes: QC gate that controls trust in other logs

name: Depth and pressure-temperature context
icon_idea: Vertical depth ruler with pressure-temperature stability envelope
notes: Depth remains alignment/context and is not normalized like other values

name: Core calibration
icon_idea: Core plug linked to a log depth tick
notes: Calibration and validation anchor where approved data exist

name: Hydrate saturation target
notes: Target or calibration output only; never an input feature
